title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Prudential Life in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
